heading: Benefitting financially from peonage, slavery, and trafficking in persons
label: 1593A Benefitting financially from peonage, slavery, and trafficking in persons
text: Whoever knowingly benefits, financially or by receiving anything of value, from participation in a venture which has engaged in any act in violation of this chapter, knowing or in reckless disregard of the fact that the venture has engaged in such violation, shall be fined under this title or imprisoned in the same manner as a completed violation of such section.
notes: Amendments2018— substituted “this chapter” for “section 1581(a), 1592, or 1595(a)”.Pub. L. 115–393
amendments: Amendments2018— substituted “this chapter” for “section 1581(a), 1592, or 1595(a)”.Pub. L. 115–393
